text:
Oh! You actually came to talk to me?
I wasn't sure you'd notice me out here...

You have no idea how long I've been hoping you'd say that.
Every morning I come out here and... wait.

Just... passing by. Right.
Well. I'll be here. Like always.

options.label: Hey, I didn't mean it like that.

text:
For you to walk over and say hello.
Took you long enough, you know.

Then stay a while? The farm isn't going anywhere.
Neither am I.
